docdb.dbclusterparametergroup.Descriptio.Description: The description for the cluster parameter group.

docdb.dbclusterparametergroup.Family.Description: The cluster parameter group family name.

docdb.dbclusterparametergroup.Name.Description: The name of the DB cluster parameter group.  Constraints:  + Must not match the name of an existing `DBClusterParameterGroup`.This value is stored as a lowercase string.

docdb.dbclusterparametergroup.Parameters.Description: Provides a list of parameters for the cluster parameter group.

docdb.dbclusterparametergroup.Tags.Description: The tags to be assigned to the cluster parameter group.
